---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea, a new card, or a rules tweak
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like to be able to do?

<!-- Describe the capability or experience as a player or contributor.
     "I'd like to share season standings as a single shareable image"
     reads better than "add a PNG export feature". -->

## Why? What problem does this solve?

<!-- The motivation. What makes the current behavior frustrating or
     limiting? Who else would benefit? -->

## How might it work?

<!-- A sketch — not a spec. CLI flags, a new command name, an example of
     the output you'd expect. Even rough is helpful. -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't pick them, or
     existing commands that almost-but-not-quite do the thing. -->
